films.title: Hustle & Flow
films.overview: With help from his friends, a Memphis pimp in a mid-life crisis attempts to become a successful hip-hop emcee.

films.title: Black Snake Moan
films.overview: A God-fearing bluesman takes to a wild young woman who, as a victim of childhood sexual abuse, is looking everywhere for love, but never quite finding it.

films.title: Footloose
films.overview: Ren MacCormack is transplanted from Boston to the small southern town of Bomont where loud music and dancing are prohibited. Not one to bow to the status quo, Ren challenges the ban, revitalizing the town and falling in love with the minister’s troubled daughter Ariel in the process.

films.title: Dolemite Is My Name
films.overview: The story of Rudy Ray Moore, who created the iconic big screen pimp character Dolemite in the 1970s.

films.title: Coming 2 America
films.overview: Prince Akeem Joffer is set to become King of Zamunda when he discovers he has a son he never knew about in America – a street savvy Queens native named Lavelle. Honoring his royal father's dying wish to groom this son as the crown prince, Akeem and Semmi set off to America once again.

films.title: Song Sung Blue
films.overview: Based on a true story, two down-on-their-luck musicians form a joyous Neil Diamond tribute band, proving it's never too late to find love and follow your dreams.
